creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Thu Apr  7 18:31:41 UTC 2016
New revision: 412683
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/412683

Log:
  New port: mail/rubygem-premailer-rails

  This gem brings you the power of the premailer gem to Rails
  without any configuration needs. Create HTML emails, include
  a CSS file as you do in a normal HTML document and premailer
  will inline the included CSS.

  WWW: https://github.com/fphilipe/premailer-rails

  PR:		208508
  Submitted by:	Torsten Zuehlsdorff <ports@toco-domains.de>

Changes:
  head/mail/Makefile
  head/mail/rubygem-premailer-rails/
  head/mail/rubygem-premailer-rails/Makefile
  head/mail/rubygem-premailer-rails/distinfo
  head/mail/rubygem-premailer-rails/pkg-descr
